Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 1. Analyze the Request: Goal: Identify a bad trace allowed by Process Tree Model but forbidden by standard Order-to-Cash domain logic. Input: Process Tree structure. Context: Model is underfitting. Standard O2C Logic: 1. Receive Order 2. Check Inventory 3. Decision Point: If Stock OK: Auth -> Pack -> Ship -> Close. If Stock Low: Cancel -> Close. Task: Find trace model accepts but shouldnt.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 2. Analyze the Provided Process Tree: receive_order Check_inventory xor_node with successful_subtree PARALLEL Authorize_Payment Package_Items Ship_Order and cancel_subtree SEQUENCE Cancel_Order Close_Order then root SEQUENCE receive_order check_inventory xor_node close_order.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 3. Evaluate the Logic vs. the Model: Domain Expectation: Receive Check Decision Success Auth Pack Ship Close or Cancel Close. Model Behavior: Receive Check XOR either Parallel Auth Pack Ship or Seq Cancel Close then Close. Flaw 1: Parallelism allows Ship before Package or Auth before Ship wrong. Flaw 2: Close duplication in cancel path leads to two Closes.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Identifying the Flaw: Parallel in success path allows any order like Ship Package Auth. Cancel path forces Receive Check Cancel Close Close. Both violate domain: no Ship before Pack no two Closes.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Possible traces: Receive Check Ship Package Authorize Close violates causal order. Receive Check Cancel Close Close violates single closure.

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Iterating between Parallelism Ship before Package and Duplicate Close: Weighing which is better underfitting example. Parallelism classic for low precision Duplicate Close structural bug.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Decision: Focus on Parallelism in Successful Path as primary underfitting due to PARALLEL operator ignoring causal dependencies. Secondary note on Close duplication.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final check: Trace Receive Check Ship Package Authorize Close valid in model via PARALLEL invalid in domain due to Ship before Package and before Auth.
